name: Senor Check Cashing #19
description_short: Señor Check Cashing #19 is a check-cashing service in Houston offering financial transaction services including check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers with extended hours.
description_long: Señor Check Cashing operates a multi-location network of check-cashing and financial services centers across the Houston area, with this location (#19 in their system, listed as #05 in some directories) serving the West 34th Street corridor. The company provides essential financial services to consumers who need quick access to cash and transaction capabilities without traditional banking relationships. Their service menu includes check cashing, money order issuance, wire transfer facilitation, and bill payment processing—core services for underbanked consumers and those seeking faster cash access than traditional banks provide. The business model focuses on convenience and accessibility, targeting working individuals and families who need immediate liquidity or basic financial transaction services. Operating with extended weekday hours (9 AM to 8 PM Monday-Thursday, 8 AM to 9 PM Friday, 8 AM to 8 PM Saturday) demonstrates commitment to serving customers with varied schedules. The company maintains a physical retail presence designed for walk-in service, with a local phone line and website indicating established community roots. Señor Check Cashing positions itself as a neighborhood financial service provider rather than a lender, distinguishing itself from payday loan shops or alternative finance companies. For consumers without bank accounts or those needing same-day cash conversion, check-cashing services fill a practical need, though fees structure and specific rates are not disclosed in available materials. The business serves a legitimate market function in providing transaction services to populations underserved by traditional banking infrastructure.
address: 920 E Little York Rd Suite 100, Houston, TX 77076

company_info.headquarters: 920 E Little York Rd Suite 100, Houston, TX 77076

pros: Extended hours including early opening (8 AM) on Friday and Saturday for working consumers
Multiple location network (referenced as #19) providing neighborhood accessibility across Houston
Established business with dedicated website and phone line indicating legitimacy
One-stop transaction services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Located in accessible West Houston area with direct phone contact available
Weekend service availability (Saturday 8 AM-8 PM) for customers who cannot visit weekdays
cons: No fee transparency provided on website or available materials—exact cashing fees unknown to prospective customers
Limited service information—specific check types accepted, identification requirements, and processing details not disclosed
Single location contact information available; unclear which services available at #19 versus other franchise locations
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked workers needing immediate check-to-cash conversion
Consumers without traditional bank accounts requiring money orders or wire transfer services
Individuals on evening or weekend schedules who need transaction services outside standard banking hours
diagnosis: Señor Check Cashing #19 is best for unbanked consumers and shift workers needing rapid check-to-cash conversion and basic financial transactions outside traditional banking hours. The primary caveat is complete lack of fee disclosure—prospective customers must visit or call to understand the cost of services before using them, as no pricing information is publicly available.
